title: Crop tips
description: Remind you that you should harvest through the model！
body:
## Crop tips

**Remind you that you should harvest through the model.**
- It contains self-luminescence with labpbr as the standard.
- There is no need to rely on optifine and so on.
- Minimum compatibility 1.13.2.


<details>
<summary>supported</summary>


-  **This resource pack conflicts with other crop resource packs.**
Supported by the MGC community and released for free

</details>
